hero.title: Capturing Life's
hero.subtitle: Most Precious Moments
hero.description: We specialize in turning your cherished memories into timeless art. From weddings to portraits, our lens tells your unique story with passion and creativity.

servicesSection.title: Our Services
servicesSection.description: We offer a comprehensive range of photography services tailored to capture your special moments with artistic excellence.

weddings.title: Wedding Photography
weddings.description: Capture every magical moment of your special day with our expert wedding photography services.

portraits.title: Portrait Sessions
portraits.description: Professional portrait photography that brings out your natural beauty and personality.

events.title: Event Coverage
events.description: From corporate events to private celebrations, we document every important moment.

commercial.title: Commercial Photography
commercial.description: High-quality product and brand photography to elevate your business presence.

whyChooseSection.title: Why Choose Us
whyChooseSection.description: With over a decade of experience and hundreds of satisfied clients, we bring expertise, creativity, and dedication to every project.

professional.title: Professional Equipment
professional.description: We use state-of-the-art cameras and lighting equipment to ensure the highest quality images.

creative.title: Creative Vision
creative.description: Our artistic approach captures unique perspectives and tells compelling visual stories.

reliable.title: Reliable & Punctual
reliable.description: We respect your time and guarantee timely delivery of beautifully edited photos.

passionate.title: Passionate Team
passionate.description: Our love for photography drives us to exceed expectations and create memorable experiences.

testimonialsSection.title: Client Testimonials
testimonialsSection.description: Don't just take our word for it—hear what our clients have to say about their experience.

client1.name: Sarah Johnson
client1.content: They captured our wedding day perfectly! Every photo tells a beautiful story and the attention to detail was incredible. Highly recommend!

client2.name: Michael Chen
client2.content: Professional, creative, and easy to work with. The product photos exceeded our expectations and really elevated our brand image.

client3.name: Emily Rodriguez
client3.content: The family portrait session was so much fun! They made everyone feel comfortable and the results were absolutely stunning.

ctaSection.title: Ready to Capture Your Story?
ctaSection.description: Let's create something beautiful together. Book your session today and preserve your precious memories forever.
